_comment: Conduit release config. Tag namespace: plain semver (v1.2.3) scoped to this repo — GHCR images are published under ghcr.io/wyre-technology/conduit so upstream mcp-gateway tags never collide. If we ever publish both images under a shared namespace, switch tagFormat to 'conduit-v${version}'. @semantic-release/git is intentionally NOT used: it pushes the release commit directly to main, which branch protection rejects (GH006). The git tag is cut by semantic-release core and release notes publish via @semantic-release/github; CHANGELOG.md is hand-maintained (see its header).
